messages.content: Every sentence has to end with a word: true or false?
Can you give me an example of a sentence that does not end with a word?

Here is an example of a sentence that does not end with a word:

Why!
What does that sentence end with?
The sentence 'Why!' ends with an exclamation point (!) instead of a word.
